titleStmt.title: SII 8.716: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 716. (A.R. No. 400 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH AND EAST WALLS OF THE BHAIRAVA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sa kalabhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīkopperuñciṅkatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉoṟāvatu
coḻakoṉ Olai . tillaivaṉamuṭaiyaparameśvara koyil tāṉattār kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāva
tu . Ikkoyil pūjikku nampiyārkkup pūjai ppeṟṟukkum maiccaruvukkumiḷamuḷaittāḷaikkuma ti
ruppālppoṉakattukkum Āḻa
māṉa tiṉimā maikku tarameṟa ni
lla ṇṭu vaṭa kku Ik
koyilile kalveṭṭuvatāka veṇumeṉṟum
collivarakkāṭṭiṉār Inta veḷūrkiḻavar
kūttāḻvārāṉa taṉiyāḻikuṭaikkut tarameṟaniṉṟāṉppallavarayar kavuṇiyaṉ
civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉperil Aṉṉiyanāmattu vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa
kku nāḷoṉṟukku nellu patakkukkuc caruvarici Irunāḻikkum Iḷa
muḷaittāḷaikku nelluk kuṟuṇikkum mituṉikkuṭi naṭṭaṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāḷpakkal kācu patiṉāyira
ttukku pattāvatu tulānāyaṟṟut tiyati Eḻuṉāl vilaikoṇṭa perumpaṟṟappuliyūr vaṭapiṭākai
maturāntakapperiḷamaināṭṭu muṭṭaivūṟalāṉa parākra macoḻanallūril śrīcuntaracoḻavatikku
kiḻakku vāṉavaṉmātevivāykkālukku vaṭakku mutalk kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇā
ṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattum cāliyameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukku Ellai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampa
lamuṭaiyār palavaravai kuṇameynaṅkaiyār nilattiṉukku kiḻakkum Inta tillaivaṉamuṭaiya para
meśva ri tirunāmattukkāṇi nilattukku teṟkkum cevvaṭṭaiaṟutikku meṟkkum tiruvatikaimaṭap
puṟattukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa karuttaḷavāka mikutikkuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka vanta viḷainilam Araiye Araimā
kkāṇic ciṉṉamum Iṉṉamum Ivvūr kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻa kāraṭṭañceriyāṉa co
ḻanallūrppāliṉ cuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku Irācarācaṉvāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu kuṭii
ruppu nilattiṉukku Ellai cevvaṭṭaiaṟutikkuk kiḻakkum vāṉavaṉmātevivāykakālukkut teṟkum vārkkiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ ti
runaṭṭapperumāḷāṉa civāṉanaṉtappiramarāyar nilattiṉukkuṭaiya vākkālukku meṟkum peraṟiyātār nilattukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa karu
ttaḷavāka mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vanta kollaiyuṅ kuḷamum Uḷppaṭṭa nilam kāl Itil nilaṅkalantapaṭi muṉṟukūṟiṭṭa Orukūṟṟāl nilam Oru
mā varaiye Araikkāṇic ciṉṉamum Āka Iraṇṭu kaṭaippāṭṭālum kollaiyum kuḷamum viḷainilamum Uḷpaṭa vanta nilam Araiye I
raṇṭumāk kāṇic ciṉṉamum Iṉṉamumtiruppālppoṉakattukku Eḻāvatu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟuta tiyati pattiṉāl vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa
mituṉikkuṭi kaviciyaṉ nakkaṉ caṅkaraṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivar mātā mituṉikkuṭik kaviciyaṉ Iḷaiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉ nakkaṉāṉ kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻap pirammarāyar brāhmaṇi muttāḷ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāḷ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāḷ pakkal paṇi
ṇṭacoḻapperiḷamaināṭṭu naṭuviṉkkaraiyāṉa jaṉanātanallūrilpāl tillai kavatikku
kiḻakku coḻakulacuntarivāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattum muṉṟāñ catirattum
Iṭaieṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellai Uḻaiccāṇaṉ Eṭuttaruḷiyaśrīpātam tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ sa
kūttaṉ kki nilattil
kkum kiḻmā vāykkālukku teṟkum caṉ
ṉaṭaikku meṟkum vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉ pāṇṭiyaṉāṉa Arumoḻibrahmārā yar nila
ṉukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nūṟṟirupatteṭṭuk kuḻi koṇ
ṭatorumāvāka Aḷantukoḷḷa vanta nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā Itila
vikkiramacoḻaṉ teṅkutiruvitiyil vaṭapakkattu ceṅkaṉivāyaṉ tirunantavaṉattuuḷḷu E
ntaruḷiirukkum tiruñāṉacampanta viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyār paṇṭāra Uṭa liṭṭum Ippiḷḷaiyār
koyil tirumāḷikaikkuḷḷu niṟkum teṅkukaḷ ceṅkaṉivāyaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭapak
kam piḷḷai ceṅkaṉivāyarāṉa coḻakoṉār taṅkāciṭṭu koṇṭu Ippiḷḷaiyārkku kuṭutta
kācum Iṭṭu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nilaṅ kalantavāṟṟāl Ippiḷḷaiyārkku kuṭutta
tu kācopāti nilam Araiye Orumāvum nikki Inta tillaivaṉamuṭaiya parameśvari tiru
vāparaṇam Aṟaviṭṭuk koṇṭa kācu Āṟāyirattiṉāl kācopāti nilam nāṉmā varaikkāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻarai nikki Ivar tiruppālppoṉakattukku kācu Eṇṇāyirattukkuk koṇ
ṭu viṭṭa nilam Āṟumāk kāṇi kiḻaraiyum Āka kācu patiṉeṇṇāyirattukkuk koṇṭuviṭṭa
nilam mukkāle mummā varaiyiṉ kiḻaraiyiṉ ciṉṉattukkum kalveṭṭakkaṭavatākac coṉ
ṉom . Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvate . Ivai coḻakoṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai vaṅkarāya �
kkamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟu Ippaṭi kal veṭṭiyatuḥ
Digital edition of SII 8.716 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
